name: IdsEdwCapPoolCdDLoad

text.value: WITH Upd AS ( SELECT f.CAP_POOL_CD_SK, f.CAP_POOL_CD, f.SRC_SYS_CD, f.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, f.CAP_POOL_NM, f.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, f.IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TMP_IdsEdwCapPoolCdDLoad f JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CAP_POOL_CD_D t ON t.CAP_POOL_CD_SK = f.CAP_POOL_CD_SK ) UPDATE t SET t.CAP_POOL_CD = Upd.CAP_POOL_CD, t.SRC_SYS_CD = Upd.SRC_SYS_CD, t.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK = Upd.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, t.CAP_POOL_NM = Upd.CAP_POOL_NM, t.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = Upd.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, t.IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = Upd.IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CAP_POOL_CD_D t JOIN Upd ON t.CAP_POOL_CD_SK = Upd.CAP_POOL_CD_SK; INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CAP_POOL_CD_D (CAP_POOL_CD_SK, CAP_POOL_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAP_POOL_NM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT f.CAP_POOL_CD_SK, f.CAP_POOL_CD, f.SRC_SYS_CD, f.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, f.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, f.CAP_POOL_NM, f.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, f.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, f.IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TMP_IdsEdwCapPoolCdDLoad f WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CAP_POOL_CD_D t WHERE t.CAP_POOL_CD_SK = f.CAP_POOL_CD_SK );

Annotations:
JobIdsEdwCapPoolCdDLoad.
Read the Load ready file created in Extract job or PKEY job
Load rejects are redirected into a Reject file

This file is an append
Load file created in the previous job will be loaded into the target DB2 table here. 

Update logic; "Update then Insert" Or "Insert then Update" will be chosen depending on the nature of data going into the table. If there are more updates than Inserts, then Update then Insert should be selected.
When the Inserts are more than Updates, then Insert then Update should be selected
